# ic-typography



<!-- Auto Generated Below -->


## Properties

| Property               | Attribute                | Description                                                                                                                                                                           | Type                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | Default     |
| ---------------------- | ------------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------- |
| `applyVerticalMargins` | `apply-vertical-margins` | If `true`, appropriate top and bottom margins will be applied to the typography.                                                                                                      | `boolean \| undefined`                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | `false`     |
| `bold`                 | `bold`                   | If `true`, the typography will have a bold font weight. Note: This will have no impact on variants that already use an equivalent or higher font weight (h1, h2, and subtitle-large). | `boolean \| undefined`                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | `false`     |
| `italic`               | `italic`                 | If `true`, the typography will have an italic font style.                                                                                                                             | `boolean \| undefined`                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | `false`     |
| `maxLines`             | `max-lines`              | The number of lines to display before truncating the text, only used for the 'body' variant.                                                                                          | `number \| undefined`                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | `undefined` |
| `strikethrough`        | `strikethrough`          | If `true`, the typography will have a line through it.                                                                                                                                | `boolean \| undefined`                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | `false`     |
| `theme`                | `theme`                  | Sets the text color to the dark or light theme color. "inherit" will set the color based on the system settings or ic-theme component.                                                | `"dark" \| "inherit" \| "light" \| undefined`                                                                                                                                                                                                       | `"inherit"` |
| `underline`            | `underline`              | If `true`, the typography will have a line under it.                                                                                                                                  | `boolean \| undefined`                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | `false`     |
| `variant`              | `variant`                | The ICDS typography style to use.                                                                                                                                                     | `"badge" \| "badge-small" \| "body" \| "caption" \| "caption-uppercase" \| "code-extra-small" \| "code-large" \| "code-small" \| "h1" \| "h2" \| "h3" \| "h4" \| "label" \| "label-uppercase" \| "subtitle-large" \| "subtitle-small" \| undefined` | `"body"`    |
